changelog: Dialer cadence: first-time callers get next contact = today + 3 hours (with time, e.g. '5/28/2026 1:32 PM'). All subsequent attempts get next contact = tomorrow (date only).

Dialer queue: leads already attempted twice or more today are skipped from today's queue entirely — picked up tomorrow. First-time→3-hour callback flow still works because that lead's attempts is only 1.
